title: Google IT Support Certificate
description: Prepare for a career in IT support. Learn troubleshooting, networking, operating systems, system administration, and security. Earn a Google Career Certificate recognized by 150+ employers.

title: Google Cybersecurity Certificate
description: Build job-ready skills for an entry-level cybersecurity role. Learn to identify threats, risks, and vulnerabilities, and apply NIST frameworks. Earn a Google Career Certificate recognized by 150+ employers.

title: Google Data Analytics Certificate
description: Learn the foundations of data analytics — data cleaning, analysis, and visualization using spreadsheets, SQL, R, and Tableau. Earn a Google Career Certificate recognized by 150+ employers.

title: Google Project Management Certificate
description: Learn project management fundamentals — initiating, planning, executing, and closing projects. Covers Agile and Scrum. Earn a Google Career Certificate recognized by 150+ employers.

title: Google AI Essentials
description: Learn to use AI tools to boost productivity and solve real workplace problems. Covers generative AI, prompt engineering, and responsible AI use. No prior AI experience required.

title: Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals (AI-900)
description: Prepare for the Azure AI Fundamentals certification. Covers AI workloads, machine learning, computer vision, NLP, and generative AI on Azure. Certification prep — no prior experience required.

title: IBM SkillsBuild — Digital Skills & Technology Training
description: Free technology and professional skills training from IBM. Covers AI, cybersecurity, cloud, data science, and career readiness. Earn IBM digital badges upon completion.

title: Cisco Networking Academy — Networking & Cybersecurity
description: Free networking and cybersecurity courses from Cisco. Covers CCNA fundamentals, network security, ethical hacking, and IoT. Prepares learners for Cisco certifications.
